question.label: Friction scan
question.name: What's been slower or harder than it should have been?
question.description: Invites them to name blockers without framing it as complaint.

answer: The last stretch shipped, but it was heavier than I made it sound.

assessment.note: Says the stretch was heavier than presented, which signals hidden friction and some mismatch between apparent and actual load.

new_queue.label: Heavier stretch
new_queue.name: When you say it was heavier, what was making it heavy?

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Keep or delegate
new_queue.name: What do you think only you should own right now?

new_queue.label: Team leverage
new_queue.name: Where are you still the bottleneck?

new_queue.label: Decision support
new_queue.name: What do you need from me to make the next two weeks easier?

new_queue.label: Closer next step
new_queue.name: Given what we’ve covered, what’s the first thing you want to change before we meet again?

history.answer_excerpt: The last stretch shipped, but it was heavier than I made it sound.
The last stretch shipped, but it was heavier than I made it sound.
